---
title: "Etabli Vitrine"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
---

<p align="center" style="margin-top:2rem;">
  <img src="_icons/icon-vitrine.svg" alt="Vitrine" width="96">
</p>

<h2 style="text-align:center; margin:1rem 0 2rem;">Sprache wählen · Choose language · Choisir la langue</h2>

<p align="center" style="font-size:1.1rem;">
  <a href="de/">Auf Deutsch</a> ·
  <a href="en/">In English</a> ·
  <a href="fr/">En français</a>
</p>
